---

name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement for the Flutter + Flame Game Starter Kit
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
-------------

## Feature Summary

Please describe the feature or improvement you would like to see.

## Problem It Solves

What problem does this feature solve?

## Proposed Solution

Describe how you think this feature could work.

## Alternatives Considered

Have you considered any alternative solutions or workarounds?

## Use Case

Who would benefit from this feature?

Examples:

* Flutter beginners
* Indie game developers
* Students
* Developers building 2D mobile games
* Developers using Flame

## Should This Be Part of the Starter Kit?

Please explain whether this feature should be part of the starter kit core, documentation, or an example game.

## Additional Context

Add screenshots, references, examples, or links if helpful.
